section_miscategorizations.reason: This imaging order is unrelated to the documented dermatologic assessment and no shoulder problem is mentioned elsewhere. Placing it in the Plan without any corresponding diagnostic impression in the Assessment could mislead the reader about the clinical reasoning and active problems.

section_miscategorizations.text: I will also schedule a physical therapy consultation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A physical therapy referral implies an additional, undocumented musculoskeletal or functional problem. Including this in the Plan without any related diagnostic impression or problem in the Assessment can mislead the reader about the patient's active issues and the rationale for the referral.
